# SDP - Query — action docs

One page per action of the [`sdp-query`](../README.md) connector: every parameter explained, plus copy-paste `input_data` variations. These pages are the targets of each operation's **Learn more** link (`externalDocs` + the description suffix in the definition).

|---|---|---|---|
| Execute query | `ExecuteQuery` | `POST /api/v3/reports/_execute_query` | [execute-query.md](execute-query.md) |
